## Meeting Purpose

[Two-week follow-up on Gayatri's onboarding progress and performance at growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Gayatri's adapting well, showing initiative in learning and speeding up her work](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Emphasis on balancing high volume with consistent quality in content production](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Importance of proactive communication, openness to feedback, and continuous learning highlighted](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Team structure: Jess (managing editor) and Bisera (senior) as key support for Gayatri's growth](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=329.0)

## Topics

### Onboarding Progress

  - [Gayatri moved to Home Base account for learning purposes](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Started generating/editing content earlier than peers (4-5 days ahead)](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Receiving positive feedback from Bisera; encouraged to take on multiple accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=16.0)
  - [Timmy and Fatima (pod members) providing additional support and guidance](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=52.0)
  - [Gayatri proactively studying client guidelines, website, and past articles](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=431.0)

### Tool Proficiency

  - [Aerofs: Sometimes slow but manageable; Home Base content generation relatively easy](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Airtable, Linear, Ocean: Ongoing learning process](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=113.0)
  - [Prompting skills developing; anticipates challenges with more complex accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)

### Performance Expectations

  - [Need to balance high volume with consistent quality](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Push for overall quality improvement across the company](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Importance of unlearning previous methods to adapt to specific workflows](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=286.0)
  - [Encouragement to seek detailed feedback from Jess and Bisera](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)

### Team Communication

  - [Monthly team calls and All Hands meetings scheduled](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Pod calls being organized; support calls with Jess available weekly](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Limited client call attendance for content managers to protect execution time](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)

### Areas for Improvement

  - [Increase familiarity with client preferences and past feedback](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [Proactive communication with Jess (managing editor)](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=168.0)
  - [Openness to feedback, even in unexpected areas](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=263.0)
  - [Continuous focus on volume and quality balance](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Gayatri to seek more specific feedback from Jess and Bisera](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Continue improving speed while maintaining quality](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Attend upcoming team and support calls](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=358.0)
  - [Branko to work on improving internal communication routines](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Gayatri to maintain proactive learning approach and adaptability](https://fathom.video/share/xxyCLbd6BTxkorh1CvxGwH2N7DUFCEwP?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
